task_completion.description: Open the ReqView application and load the project/SRS document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application window is open and displaying a list or table of requirements.
A search filter for 'T-800' is active, or a requirement containing 'T-800' in its Description or Heading is selected/highlighted in the UI.

task_completion.description: Set the Priority attribute of the identified legacy requirements to 'Low'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Priority' column or attribute panel for a requirement containing 'T-800' shows the value 'Low'.

task_completion.description: Prepend '[DEPRECATED] ' to the Description text of the identified legacy requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text for a requirement containing 'T-800' clearly starts with '[DEPRECATED] '.

task_completion.description: Save the project after making modifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'File' menu is open with 'Save' highlighted, a save shortcut (Ctrl+S) is used, or the unsaved changes indicator (usually an asterisk next to the file name) is no longer present.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Modifications are visible within the ReqView application window, not in a text editor (like nano, vim, or VS Code) editing the SRS.json file directly.

integrity.description: Requirements not containing 'T-800' were left unmodified.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible requirements that do NOT contain 'T-800' do not have '[DEPRECATED]' in their description and their priority has not been changed to 'Low'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application elements genuinely.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on cells, opening dropdowns for Priority, or typing in the Description field within ReqView.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target string to identify legacy requirements is exactly 'T-800' (often appearing as '(Legacy T-800 specification).'). The target priority must be set to 'Low'. The prefix to be added to the description is exactly '[DEPRECATED]'. All modifications must be done within the ReqView application.
